case_title: SAN FRANICSCO AUTOCENTER VS XYCOR et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,211.50 FILED BY SAN FRANICSCO AUTOCENTER AS TO DEFENDANT XYCOR IMPERIAL CASUALTY AND INDEMNITY COMPANY KIRTCHLOW AND ASSOCIATES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANICSCO AUTOCENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT XYCOR IMPERIAL CASUALTY AND INDEMNITY COMPANY KIRTCHLOW AND ASSOCIATES $2,139.50 PRINCIPAL, $140.63 INTEREST, $181.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,461.13, INDEMNITY FOR 707683 $2111.50 PLUS $28.00 COST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
